{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Hunter ships
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Hunter ships]] are used by the [[Iron Legion]] to blow targets apart with plasma cannons.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
